theme_and_archetype.theme: Light & Dark (Toggle required in top-right header)
theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for user's explicit flat/teal constraints)

global_rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use flat color fills only.
global_rules.shadows: Minimal or none. Rely on 1px borders for structure.

rules.no_inter: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.

spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
spacing_and_layout.kpi_cards: col-span-1. F-pattern priority: Total Collected, Total Utilized, Balance, % Utilized.
spacing_and_layout.charts_layout: PieChart (Category): col-span-1 md:col-span-2. BarChart (Monthly): col-span-1 md:col-span-2 or 3. Ensure 100% height filling.
spacing_and_layout.activity_feed: List format. Compact vertical spacing. col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-1 if side-aligned.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing: use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. py-8 for sections.

components.buttons: Flat background, rounded-[8px], transition-colors duration-200. No drop shadows.
components.google_btn: Flat white (light) or flat dark gray (dark), 1px border, rounded-[8px], left-aligned G logo.
components.cards: bg-surface rounded-[12px] border border-border p-6. Flat design, zero shadow.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. rounded-[8px], border border-border, bg-transparent. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none.
components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. See colors.status.
components.tables: Flat headers. 1px bottom border on rows. Left-aligned data. No vertical dividers.
components.charts: Recharts. Monochromatic teal scales (#1D9E75, #147A5A, #5DCAA5) for primary data. Flat fills only, no gradients.
components.sidebar: Left sidebar for navigation. Light/Dark toggle in top-right global header.

formatting_and_logic.currency: INR formatting only. Use Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }). Example: ₹1,00,000
formatting_and_logic.roles: Admin (Full CRUD + User Mgmt), Contributor (Fund/Utilization CRUD), Viewer (Read-only)

login_background.description: Modern office building's symmetrical facade with vertical lines. Use on the right side of a split-screen login layout.
login_background.overlay: bg-black/20 to maintain flat/clean look without obscuring the architecture.

development_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='kpi-balance').
development_rules.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep them minimal, 20px for sidebar, 16px for inline.
development_rules.mobile_first: Start with grid-cols-1 for all layouts. Use max-h-[80vh] for any large media on mobile. Hamburger menu on mobile only.
